Notice Of Motion And Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Nov-04-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs JUANA LAPITAN and GLENN LAPITAN's motion for apportionment proceeding and for an order to distribute settlement funds is granted. No opposition filed. Judge: Harold Kahn, Matter not reported = (220/HEK)

Hearing On Plaintiff'S Motion To Apportion Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Nov-04-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on plaintiff's Motion to Apportion Settlement Funds.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared on behalf of Brayton Purcell LLP.
Plaintiff Juana Lapitan was present as Legal Heir of Winston Lapitan.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Angela Martinez was placed under oath and served as Spanish speaking interpreter for plaintiff.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court Orders that the following are entitled to distribution of all net settlement funds from the underlying personal injury - survival and wrongful death actions in the following proportions:

Juana Lapitan, as sole Wrongful Death Heir - 55%
Estate of Winston Lapitan for any surviving claims - 45%

Brayton Purcell LLP shall recover the sum of $1,006.00 as reasonable attorney fees & costs, leaving the net amount of $36,444.69. Any future net settlement funds shall be distributed in the percentages set forth above.

The signature of Juana Lapitan shall be sufficient on all settlement documents with any defendants in the underlying asbestos survival and wrongful death action.

Order Granting Motion to Distribute Settlement Funds was submitted to and signed by the Court.
